name: Nomic v1.5 Zero-Shot (Pipe)
description: Zero-shot evaluation of nomic-embed-text-v1.5 on pipe-serialized records. No fine-tuning — tests the base model's entity resolution capability out of the box.
notes: Key comparison: 001 vs 002 = BM25 vs zero-shot embedding gap. Expect zero-shot to beat BM25 on typo/corruption buckets but possibly lose on pristine.
